Applied Lindquistics is a game changer for Black People.

title: A DAY IN MY LIFE | Gym, Work, Eating
body: not gonna lie, i felt numb for months. like i was just surviving, not really living. then someone dropped Testosterone Rewired by David Brooks in a yt comment and i gave it a shot. bro… this book gave me my edge back. not by yelling at me to hustle, but by showing me how to fix my foundation. life hits different now.
author: @w9x__emostions

title: A DAY IN MY LIFE | Gym, Work, Eating
body: This was raw af. The amount of solitude and focus you need to achieve something great is what is required… it’s not always glamorous and you unapologetic demonstrated it so well

title: COLLEGE VLOG: FIRST DAY of Class | University of Memphis
body: I am from Memphis cool to see A YouTuber that's from where I stay, I used to go to U of M. You had me reminiscing when I used to be on campus, eating and hanging out at the UC, going to the rec center, you passed my old dorm Smith hall and yes parking took forever to find lol, but loved the vlog of my old college.
author: @Gawdess_Sunnie

title: ESPN REPOSTED MY VIDEO 😱 FULL UNIVERSITY OF MEMPHIS POOL PARTY VIDEO OUT NOW 🐯💦
body:
LMMFAO!!! fun!! I grew up in Memphis a long time ago when it was called Memphis State University, and we lived on Central Cove, right on the corner of the Campus... I went to Campus Elementary, and the entire campus was my playground... my family moved to Atlanta when I was 13, but i miss those old days so much. Memphis is so dangerous now..

but it's great to see all these young Memphis having fun, instead of shooting eachother
author: @FakeCrisis

title: ESPN REPOSTED MY VIDEO 😱 FULL UNIVERSITY OF MEMPHIS POOL PARTY VIDEO OUT NOW 🐯💦
body: I'm a white girl from Memphis. I chuckle bc no matter how flipping hot it gets, black folks always keep the shirt on 🤣. Love and respect 💙
author: @Sarah-ru9se

title: ESPN REPOSTED MY VIDEO 😱 FULL UNIVERSITY OF MEMPHIS POOL PARTY VIDEO OUT NOW 🐯💦
body: This was at the gather in Memphis tn by the UofM. They drained the pool right after. They were planning on doing the same at The Nine where I lived but our management staff shut that down quickly. It never happened there. Thank god too. This is just awful. I cannot believe these people did this. So disrespectful and just down right disgusting.
